message:
feat(beta-loop): add min_feedback_per_cohort promotion gate

Promotion previously only required enough observations (telemetry) but
could proceed with zero qualitative feedback. Add a separate
min_feedback_per_cohort threshold (default 10) that blocks promotion
until enough real user feedback items have been collected per cohort.
When feedback is insufficient, an "insufficient_feedback" DecisionReason
is emitted with a structured explanation.

Includes unit test for the HOLD path and proptest coverage for the new
config field.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
